mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WS_OFFLINE_MESSAGE (ID, SENDER_ACCOUNT, RECEIVER_ACCOUNT, CONTENT, MES_TYPE, IS_SENT, CONTENT_TYPE, CREATE_TIME, BUSINESS_ID, BUSINESS_TYPE, DEPT_ID, POST_CODE, MES_SHOW_TYPE) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{senderAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isSent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{businessId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{businessType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mesShowType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, SENDER_ACCOUNT, RECEIVER_ACCOUNT, CONTENT, MES_TYPE, IS_SENT, CONTENT_TYPE, CREATE_TIME, BUSINESS_ID, BUSINESS_TYPE, DEPT_ID, POST_CODE, MES_SHOW_TYPE FROM WS_OFFLINE_MESSAGE WHERE RECEIVER_ACCOUNT = #{receiverAccount,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND IS_SENT = '0'
select USER_ACCOUNT from sys_user where DEPT_ID = #{deptId} and POST_CODE = #{postCode}
